Production Of Financial Records; Production Of News Papers Articles; Production Of Photos, Video, Tapes, Files Concerning Employment And Harassment File
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
James Gavin, appearing in Propria Persona.
Paul H. Duvall, Esq., appearing for Defendant/opposing party: Channel 4
Jody Willson Palmer, Esq., appearing for Defendant/opposing party: S.F. Chronicle.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff James Gavin's Motion To Compel Production Of Financial Records, Newspaper Articles, Photos, Video Tapes, and Files Concerning Employment And Harassment File is denied. What has been filed is a discovery request. There is no basis for a motion to compel. Channel 4. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Justin T. Curley of Littler Mendelson, 433-1940, appearing for defendant and moving party
James Gavin, 925-497-5429, plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona

This matter was not argued. Plaintiff's oral request for an extension of time to oppose the demurrer was denied, but the Court granted his oral request for more time to amend the complaint. The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CHRONICLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul H. Duvall of King & Ballow Law Offices, 858-597-6000, appearing for defendant and moving party
James Gavin, 925-491-5420, plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona

This matter was not argued. Plaintiff's oral request for an extension of time to file an opposition was denied. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT YOUNG BROADCASTING OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
